---
title: "RRAC_CLUSTER_ANALYSIS"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(Matrix)
  library(ggrepel)
  library(EnhancedVolcano)
})
```

## Analysis Overview

Comparing differential gene expression between two groups of RRAC226 slices:
- **Group 1 (45-1)**: 45-1A, 45-1B, 45-1C, 45-1D
- **Group 2 (45-2)**: 45-2A, 45-2B, 45-2C

```{r paths}
############################################################
## PATHS
############################################################

root_dir <- "/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/RRAC226_DE_ANALYSIS"
dir.create(root_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# RRAC226 data path
rrac226_path <- "/Users/preddy/Desktop/Lab_Streeter/Sanjana/Male_DataSet/data/RR_AC226_filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5"

# ITS2 mapping
male_its2_path <- "~/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/DATA/MALE/ITS2.csv"

cat("Saving results to:", root_dir, "\n\n")
```

## Helper Functions

```{r helper-functions}
# Clean barcode format
clean_barcode <- function(bc) {
  bc <- sub("^.*_", "", bc)
  bc <- sub("-\\d+$", "", bc)
  bc
}

# Clean slice ID
clean_slice_id <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(x)
  x <- sub("\\s+ITS$", "", x)
  x
}

# Get genes to exclude (cardiac, RBC, mitochondrial)
get_genes_to_exclude <- function(all_genes) {
  exclude_exact <- c(
    "Myl2","Tnni3","Actc1","Fabp3","Cox8b","Cox6a2","mt-Nd5",
    "Atp2a2","mt-Nd4l","Pln","Tnnc1","Myl3","Csrp3","Ech1",
    "Atp5a1","Cryab","Ckm","Atp5o","Atp5b","Ldhb","Tnnt2",
    "Mdh1","Ogdh","Eno3","Alas2","Epb41","Fech",
    "Hba-a1","Hba-a2","Myh7","Mybpc3","Tcap","Cmya5","Myoz2",
    "Xirp2","Ankrd1","Fhl2","Scn5a","Kcnip2","Sln","Fxyd6",
    "Nppa","Nppb"
  )
  
  exclude_genes <- all_genes[
    all_genes %in% exclude_exact |
    grepl("^Hbb", all_genes) 
  ]
  
  return(unique(exclude_genes))
}
```

## 1. Load RRAC226 Data

```{r load-data}
cat("Loading RRAC226 data...\n")

# Load 10x data
counts <- Read10X_h5(rrac226_path)

# Create Seurat object
rrac226 <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = counts,
  project = "RRAC226"
)

rrac226$sample <- "RRAC226"
rrac226$sex <- "Male"

# Add cleaned barcode
rrac226$barcode_clean <- clean_barcode(colnames(rrac226))
rrac226$barcode_id <- paste(rrac226$sex, rrac226$sample, rrac226$barcode_clean, sep = "_")

cat("Loaded:", ncol(rrac226), "spots,", nrow(rrac226), "genes\n")

# Join layers for Seurat v5
if (inherits(rrac226[["RNA"]], "Assay5")) {
  rrac226[["RNA"]] <- JoinLayers(rrac226[["RNA"]])
}
```

## 2. Filter Genes

```{r filter-genes}
cat("\n=== FILTERING GENES ===\n")
genes_before <- nrow(rrac226)
cat("Total genes before filtering:", genes_before, "\n")

all_genes <- rownames(rrac226)
genes_to_exclude <- get_genes_to_exclude(all_genes)

cat("Genes to exclude:", length(genes_to_exclude), "\n")

genes_to_keep <- setdiff(all_genes, genes_to_exclude)
cat("Genes to keep:", length(genes_to_keep), "\n")

# Remove excluded genes
rrac226 <- subset(rrac226, features = genes_to_keep)

genes_after <- nrow(rrac226)
cat("Total genes after filtering:", genes_after, "\n")
cat("Genes removed:", genes_before - genes_after, "\n")
cat("=== GENE FILTERING COMPLETE ===\n\n")
```

## 3. Map Slices using ITS2

```{r its2-mapping}
cat("Loading ITS2 mapping...\n")

# Load ITS2
male_its <- read.csv(male_its2_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
male_its$slice_id <- clean_slice_id(male_its$ITS2)

# Define RRAC226 slices
rrac226_slices <- data.frame(
  slice_id = c("45-1A", "45-1B", "45-1C", "45-1D", "45-2A", "45-2B", "45-2C"),
  slice_group = c(
    rep("Group1_45-1", 4),
    rep("Group2_45-2", 3)
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Clean slice IDs
rrac226_slices$slice_id_clean <- clean_slice_id(rrac226_slices$slice_id)

# Filter ITS2 to only RRAC226 slices
male_its_rrac <- male_its %>%
  filter(slice_id %in% rrac226_slices$slice_id_clean)

# Add group labels
male_its_rrac$slice_group <- rrac226_slices$slice_group[
  match(male_its_rrac$slice_id, rrac226_slices$slice_id_clean)
]

# Clean barcodes
male_its_rrac$barcode_clean <- clean_barcode(male_its_rrac$Barcode)

# Create barcode_id for matching
male_its_rrac$barcode_id <- paste(
  "Male",
  "RRAC226",
  male_its_rrac$barcode_clean,
  sep = "_"
)

cat("RRAC226 ITS2 barcodes:", nrow(male_its_rrac), "\n")

# Map to Seurat object
rrac226$slice_id <- male_its_rrac$slice_id[
  match(rrac226$barcode_id, male_its_rrac$barcode_id)
]

rrac226$slice_group <- male_its_rrac$slice_group[
  match(rrac226$barcode_id, male_its_rrac$barcode_id)
]

# Filter to only spots with slice assignments
rrac226_filtered <- subset(rrac226, subset = !is.na(slice_group))

cat("\nSpots with slice assignments:", ncol(rrac226_filtered), "\n")

# Check group sizes
cat("\nGroup sizes:\n")
print(table(rrac226_filtered$slice_group, useNA = "ifany"))

cat("\nSlice distribution:\n")
print(table(rrac226_filtered$slice_id, rrac226_filtered$slice_group))
```

## 4. Process and Normalize

```{r normalize}
cat("\nNormalizing data...\n")

# Normalize
rrac226_filtered <- NormalizeData(rrac226_filtered)

# Scale (optional, but helps with visualization)
rrac226_filtered <- ScaleData(rrac226_filtered)

cat("Processing complete!\n")
```

## 5. Differential Expression Analysis

```{r differential-expression}
cat("\n=== DIFFERENTIAL EXPRESSION ANALYSIS ===\n")
cat("Comparing: Group1_45-1 (n=4 slices) vs Group2_45-2 (n=3 slices)\n\n")

# Set identity to slice_group
Idents(rrac226_filtered) <- "slice_group"

# Perform differential expression
# Group1_45-1 vs Group2_45-2
de_results <- FindMarkers(
  rrac226_filtered,
  ident.1 = "Group1_45-1",
  ident.2 = "Group2_45-2",
  test.use = "wilcox",
  logfc.threshold = 0,
  min.pct = 0.1,
  verbose = TRUE
)

cat("\nDifferential expression complete!\n")
cat("Total genes tested:", nrow(de_results), "\n")

# Add gene names as a column
de_results$gene <- rownames(de_results)

# Reorder columns
de_results <- de_results %>%
  select(gene, everything())

# Add significance labels
de_results$significance <- "NS"
de_results$significance[de_results$p_val_adj < 0.05 & de_results$avg_log2FC > 0.5] <- "Up in Group1 (45-1)"
de_results$significance[de_results$p_val_adj < 0.05 & de_results$avg_log2FC < -0.5] <- "Up in Group2 (45-2)"

# Summary
cat("\nSignificant genes (FDR < 0.05, |log2FC| > 0.5):\n")
print(table(de_results$significance))

# Top upregulated in Group1 (45-1)
cat("\nTop 10 genes upregulated in Group1 (45-1):\n")
top_group1 <- de_results %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > 0) %>%
  arrange(p_val_adj, desc(avg_log2FC)) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  select(gene, avg_log2FC, p_val, p_val_adj)
print(top_group1)

write.csv(
  top_group1,
  file.path(root_dir, "RRAC226_Group1_45-1_UPREGULATED.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)

# Top upregulated in Group2 (45-2)
cat("\nTop 10 genes upregulated in Group2 (45-2):\n")
top_group2 <- de_results %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC < 0) %>%
  arrange(p_val_adj, avg_log2FC) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  select(gene, avg_log2FC, p_val, p_val_adj)
print(top_group2)


write.csv(
  top_group2,
  file.path(root_dir, "RRAC226_Group2_45-2_UPREGULATED.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
)

```

## 6. Save Results

```{r save-results}
# Save full results
output_file <- file.path(root_dir, "DE_Results_Group1_45-1_vs_Group2_45-2.csv")
write.csv(de_results, output_file, row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)

cat("\n✓ Saved full DE results to:", output_file, "\n")

# Save significant genes only
sig_genes <- de_results %>%
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.5)

sig_output_file <- file.path(root_dir, "DE_Results_Significant_Genes.csv")
write.csv(sig_genes, sig_output_file, row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)

cat("✓ Saved significant genes to:", sig_output_file, "\n")
cat("  Total significant genes:", nrow(sig_genes), "\n")
```

## 7. Volcano Plot

```{r volcano-plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
cat("\nGenerating volcano plot...\n")

# Prepare data for volcano plot
volcano_data <- de_results %>%
  mutate(
    neg_log10_pval = -log10(p_val_adj),
    label = ifelse(
      p_val_adj < 0.01 & abs(avg_log2FC) > 1,
      gene,
      ""
    )
  )

# Create volcano plot
p_volcano <- ggplot(
  volcano_data,
  aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = neg_log10_pval, color = significance)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") +
  geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = label),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 20,
    box.padding = 0.5,
    point.padding = 0.3,
    segment.size = 0.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Up in Group1 (45-1)" = "#d62728",  # red
      "Up in Group2 (45-2)" = "#2ca02c",  # green
      "NS" = "grey70"
    ),
    name = "Significance"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Differential Expression: Group1 (45-1) vs Group2 (45-2)",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "RRAC226 slices | ",
      sum(de_results$significance == "Up in Group1 (45-1)"), " genes up in Group1, ",
      sum(de_results$significance == "Up in Group2 (45-2)"), " genes up in Group2"
    ),
    x = "log2 Fold Change (Group1 vs Group2)",
    y = "-log10(FDR-adjusted p-value)"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(p_volcano)

# Save volcano plot
volcano_file <- file.path(root_dir, "Volcano_Plot_Group1_vs_Group2.png")
ggsave(volcano_file, p_volcano, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

cat("✓ Saved volcano plot to:", volcano_file, "\n")
```


## 8. Summary Statistics

```{r summary}
cat("\n=== ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("Total spots analyzed:", ncol(rrac226_filtered), "\n")
cat("  Group1 (45-1):", sum(rrac226_filtered$slice_group == "Group1_45-1"), "spots\n")
cat("  Group2 (45-2):", sum(rrac226_filtered$slice_group == "Group2_45-2"), "spots\n")
cat("\nTotal genes tested:", nrow(de_results), "\n")
cat("Significant genes (FDR < 0.05, |log2FC| > 0.5):", nrow(sig_genes), "\n")
cat("  Up in Group1:", sum(de_results$significance == "Up in Group1 (45-1)"), "\n")
cat("  Up in Group2:", sum(de_results$significance == "Up in Group2 (45-2)"), "\n")
cat("\nAll results saved to:", root_dir, "\n")
cat("========================\n")
```
